test_constructor_succeeds().notice: Tests if the owner was set correctly during deploy.

test_receive_succeeds().notice: Tests that receive works as inteded.

test_withdrawERC20_succeeds().notice: Test withdrawERC20 with token and address arguments, from owner.

test_withdrawERC20_unauthorized_reverts(.notice: Same as withdrawERC20 but call from non-owner.

test_withdrawERC20withAmount_succeeds().notice: Similar as withdrawERC20 but specify amount to withdraw.

test_withdrawERC20withAmount_unauthorize.notice: Similar as withdrawERC20 with amount but call from non-owner.

test_withdrawERC721_unauthorized_reverts.notice: Similar as withdrawERC721 but call from non-owner.

test_withdrawETH_succeeds().notice: Tests withdrawETH function with only an address         as an argument, called by owner.

test_withdrawETH_unauthorized_reverts().notice: withdrawETH should fail if called by non-owner.

test_withdrawETHwithAmount_succeeds().notice: Similar as withdrawETH but specify amount to withdraw.

test_withdrawETHwithAmount_unauthorized_.notice: withdrawETH with address and amount as arguments called by non-owner.

test_constructor_succeeds().notice: Tests if the owner was set correctly during deploy.

test_receive_succeeds().notice: Tests that receive works as inteded.

test_withdrawERC20_succeeds().notice: Test withdrawERC20 with token and address arguments, from owner.

test_withdrawERC20_unauthorized_reverts(.notice: Same as withdrawERC20 but call from non-owner.

test_withdrawERC20withAmount_succeeds().notice: Similar as withdrawERC20 but specify amount to withdraw.

test_withdrawERC20withAmount_unauthorize.notice: Similar as withdrawERC20 with amount but call from non-owner.

test_withdrawERC721_unauthorized_reverts.notice: Similar as withdrawERC721 but call from non-owner.

test_withdrawETH_succeeds().notice: Tests withdrawETH function with only an address         as an argument, called by owner.
